mapper.select:
select reviewBBS.*, classBBS.cTitle from reviewBBS left join classBBS on reviewBBS.cNum = classBBS.cNum where 1 = 1
and reviewBBS.rStatus = 2
and ${keyField} like concat('%', #{keyword}, '%')
order by reviewBBS.rNum desc
select reviewBBS.*, classBBS.cTitle from reviewBBS left join classBBS on reviewBBS.cNum = classBBS.cNum where reviewBBS.cNum = #{cNum} and reviewBBS.rStatus = 2 order by reviewBBS.rNum desc

select reviewBBS.*, classBBS.cTitle from reviewBBS left join classBBS on reviewBBS.cNum = classBBS.cNum where reviewBBS.rStatus = 2 order by reviewBBS.rRegDate desc, reviewBBS.rNum desc limit #{limit}
select reviewBBS.*, classBBS.cTitle from reviewBBS left join classBBS on reviewBBS.cNum = classBBS.cNum where reviewBBS.rNum = #{rNum}
mapper.update: update reviewBBS set rCnt = rCnt + 1 where rNum = #{rNum}
update reviewBBS set rStatus = #{status}, updatedDate = current_timestamp where rNum = #{rNum}
mapper.select: select exists(select 1 from reviewLikes where uId = #{uId} and rNum = #{rNum})
mapper.update: update reviewBBS set rLikes = rLikes + 1 where rNum = #{rNum}
